mapper.select: SELECT CS_NO AS csNo , CS_CAT_CD AS csCatCd , CS_WRTER_NO AS csWrterNo , CS_TITLE AS csTitle , CS_CONTENT AS csContent , CS_INQIRE_CNT AS csInqireCnt , CS_PIN_YN AS csPinYn , CS_REG_DATE AS csRegDate , CS_UP_DATE AS csUpDate , CS_USE_YN AS csUseYn FROM CUSTOMER_SUPPORT WHERE CS_CAT_CD = 'CSS001' AND CS_USE_YN = 'Y' ORDER BY CS_PIN_YN DESC, CS_REG_DATE DESC

SELECT CS_NO AS csNo , CS_CAT_CD AS csCatCd , CS_WRTER_NO AS csWrterNo , CS_TITLE AS csTitle , CS_CONTENT AS csContent , CS_INQIRE_CNT AS csInqireCnt , CS_PIN_YN AS csPinYn , CS_REG_DATE AS csRegDate , CS_UP_DATE AS csUpDate , CS_USE_YN AS csUseYn FROM CUSTOMER_SUPPORT WHERE CS_CAT_CD = 'CSS002' AND CS_USE_YN = 'Y' ORDER BY CS_REG_DATE DESC
